issues.detail: The skill file only demonstrates happy path usage and does not cover error handling or edge cases.
The skill assumes a Python environment and specific libraries, limiting portability to other AI agent platforms.

scenarios.name: setup-phoenix-tracing
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully satisfies the rubric, while Response A does not mention the required Phoenix launch, tracer registration, or OpenAI instrumentation.

scenarios.name: run-rag-evaluations
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully satisfies the rubric, while Response B does not meet the required Phoenix API usage.
